mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM users) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM articles) AS totalArticles, (SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM article_likes) AS totalLikes, (SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments) AS totalComments, (SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM article_shares) AS totalShares

SELECT article_id AS articleId, title, category_name AS categoryName, like_count AS likeCount, comment_count AS commentCount, share_count AS shareCount, view_count AS viewCount, (like_count * 3 + comment_count * 4 + share_count * 2 + view_count * 0.1) AS totalScore FROM v_article_stats ORDER BY totalScore DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT cm.id AS id, cm.article_id AS articleId, a.title AS articleTitle, cm.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, '匿名用户') AS userNickname, cm.content AS content, cm.status AS status, COALESCE(cm.admin_note, '') AS adminNote, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments cm LEFT JOIN articles a ON a.id = cm.article_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.user_id ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT article_id AS articleId, title, category_name AS categoryName, like_count AS likeCount, comment_count AS commentCount, share_count AS shareCount, view_count AS viewCount, (like_count * 3 + comment_count * 4 + share_count * 2 + view_count * 0.1) AS totalScore FROM v_article_stats ORDER BY totalScore DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_logs (admin_id, action, target_type, target_id, detail) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{detail})
